scripts.build:web: mkdir -p dist && cp docs/client.html dist/index.html && rm -rf dist/avatars && cp -r avatars dist/avatars && npx esbuild src/capacitor-bridge.js --bundle --outfile=dist/capacitor-bridge.js --format=iife
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:web && npx cap sync
scripts.keystore:pull: rclone copy gdrive:mypail-keystore/mypail-upload.jks android/app/ && echo '✅ Keystore synced from Google Drive'
scripts.build:apk: npm run keystore:pull && npm run cap:sync && JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21 ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk ./android/gradlew -p android assembleDebug && rclone copy android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk gdrive:MyPAiL/ && echo '✅ APK uploaded to Google Drive > MyPAiL'
scripts.build:aab: npm run keystore:pull && npm run cap:sync && JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21 ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk ./android/gradlew -p android bundleRelease && rclone copy android/app/build/outputs/bundle/release/app-release.aab gdrive:MyPAiL/ && echo '✅ AAB uploaded to Google Drive > MyPAiL'
scripts.bump: node scripts/bump.js && git add package.json android/app/build.gradle docs/client.html && git commit -m "$(cat .bump-version)" && rm -f .bump-version && git push && npm run build:aab
